message:
feat(website): add beta install toggle and improve mobile layout

- Add β BETA toggle button in code header for one-liner and npm modes
- Dynamic comments change based on beta state:
  - One-liner: "Living on the edge. Bugs are features you found first."
  - npm: "Install Clawdbot (beta) — Fresh from the lab"
- Simplify curl command: remove --proto and --tlsv1.2 flags
- Shorten mode labels: "One-liner" | "npm" | "Hackable" | "macOS"
- Fix mobile layout: contextual switches now consistently appear above mode tabs
